---
title: "Philip Moor"
---

## Philip Moor

**Dates:** (1863-20 June 1887)

### Description

fourth and youngest son of the Rev. John Frewen Moor, jr.

### Biography

He died of typhoid on Golden Jubilee day [<i>Erminois</i>; 1871 census]

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 26th 1868

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
